source_notes.facility_points: PeeringDB facilities with coordinates. 5263 points extracted. Observed coordinates. Represents telecom facility density.
source_notes.ixp_proxy_points: PeeringDB facilities with ix_count > 0. 1973 points extracted. Observed coordinates. Proxy for interconnection hub density.

metadata.disclaimer: These are facility and IXP proximity proxy points from PeeringDB. Facility proximity does not confirm carrier service, dark fiber availability, route diversity, or commercial interconnection availability. IXP proxy points indicate facilities connected to one or more Internet Exchange Points.
